channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Drain blocked, 26th June
item.description:
Drains blocked by tree debris from flooding last week.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 51, Belvedere Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 26th June
item.description:
This van has been parked on woodlodge gardens since Monday. Can be a hazard for large vehicles to manoeuvre around it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woodlodge Gardens, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ongoing flytipping, 26th June
item.description:
Everyone I walk past here there is more rubbish piling up

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shacklewell Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Motorised gate not working, 26th June
item.description:
The motorised gate to the court isn't opening i think the motors have gone

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 118, Harrow Manorway, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Non stop flytipping, 26th June
item.description:
As soon as it is cleared up they do it again

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shacklewell Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unswept pedestrian walkway, 26th June
item.description:
Once again I feel the need to report the filthy condition of the pedestrianised section of Bexley Broadway. It does not appear to have been properly cleaned for months with litter everywhere and overflowing bins. Surely as the major shopping area this should not be so ? Please arrange a deep cleanse of this area.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Broadway, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 65 Lawford Road, 26th June
item.description:
Abandoned scooter with no numberplate outside 65 Lawford Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58, Lawford Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown vegetation blocking pavement, 26th June
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish over pavement, 26th June
item.description:
Overflowing bins. Rubbis now over pavement. Number 32 brook drive.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, Brook Drive, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several abandoned/stripped bicycles, 26th June
item.description:
There are two sets of stands, outside of the Foot Health clinic, with several bicycles locked. One of them is completely stripped and rusty. Others have clearly been there for a long time, with deflated tyres and vegetation. This is inconvenient for other cyclists who want to park, unsightly and a trip hazard, especially outside of a foot health clinic!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Keyse Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Building materials and children’s scooter, 26th June
item.description:
Building materials and children’s scooter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burgoyne Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox outside 63 Hayfield Road, 26th June
item.description:
Dead fox
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 57, Hayfield Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nobody removing the bike, 26th June
item.description:
Hackney council need to take control of this situation as Lime refuse. Total disgrace

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, 44a, Charlotte Road, Shoreditch, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Matteress has been dumped by the low life residents of this HMO, 26th June
item.description:
Matteress has been dumped by the low life residents of this HMO today, tjis is the second time in weeks.!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Paroma Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London

item.title: Wooden pallet still there, 26th June
item.description:
Dumped and need to be removed!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 151, Walworth Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London

item.title: Try hanging over our garden, 26th June
item.description:
Tree needs to be cut down properties stop it overgrwing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19-24, Palace Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Communal garden, Clinger Court, 26th June
item.description:
This fly tipping always throw from residen in clinger Court. Al yhe wast included cigarettes , Alcohol can and bottles dropped in communal garden.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hobbs Place Estate, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cabinet and rubbish bags, 26th June
item.description:
I have already reported this and it still has not been collected. There is a white cabinet in pieces and it has now attracted black bag rubbish.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Congo Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 26th June
item.description:
Someone has dumped rubbish early this morning. There is also a dangerous pipe vertically propped inside said waste.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Charminster Road, Chinbrook, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Consistent ilegal parking, 26th June
item.description:
Blocks entire street at all times of the day, illegally offloading & consistenly using it as a loading bay. Offten with two huge vans blocking each other. This should be a quiet side street to a school and instead is a blocked street used as a loading bay

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lauriston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
